creator: Axel.Rau@Chaos1.DE
text:
Created attachment 178060
svn diff

This update fixes a runtime issue, due to an incompatible API change in
databases/py-sqlparse-0.2.2.
It requires updates to
  devel/py-calendar (PR 215384)
  devel/py-twext (PR 215385)
and a new port
  databases/py-sqlparse01 (PR 215386)

Attached are the svndiff and poudriere testport log.
